description: QUBO / Ising coupling matrices for CIM upload and hybrid classical--quantum diagnostics. Derived artefacts only; raw market traces are not redistributed.
encoding: q0..q23 = charge c_t; q24..q47 = discharge d_t
energy: E = x @ Q @ x + const,  x in {0,1}^48
note: No CSV dumps. Load the .npy matrix on the CIM / annealer.
